title: Acacallis hoehnei
taxonomy: Acacallis hoehnei is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to Brazil and is a type of orchid, specifically belonging to the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. The genus Acacallis is a small group of flowering plants, and Acacallis hoehnei is one of its species. This plant is endemic to the Atlantic Forest region of Brazil. Further classification of Acacallis hoehnei includes its kingdom as Plantae and its order as Gentianales.

Its leaves and roots contain various bioactive compounds that may have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects.
